description:
Parent epic: V3 E4: Actions and tools

Source task 7/7 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Review file layout for action/tool adapters.

Epic closure criteria:
- the public DSL reads as actions/capabilities, not plumbing
- all operation surfaces have consistent validation and inspection
- tests cover duplicate/invalid operation registration

comments.text: Moved the internal provider/tool adapter out of the top-level Jidoka.Tool module and into Jidoka.Action.Adapter. Jidoka.Action remains the public authoring facade while internal operation surfaces call the adapter explicitly.

title: E4: Review file layout for action/tool adapters
